title: cliffortia pilifera
intro: Cliffortia pilifera is a species of flowering plant in the family Rhamnaceae, commonly known as the hairy cliffortia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cliffortia pilifera include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues. Cliffortia pilifera can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
